title: oVirt / RHV Administrator Login and Privileged Action Audit Trail
spl:
index=virtualization sourcetype="ovirt:audit" earliest=-24h
| where action="LOGIN" OR action="LOGOUT" OR like(action, "ADD_%") OR like(action, "REMOVE_%") OR like(action, "UPDATE_%") OR like(lower(action), "%vm%") OR like(lower(action), "%host%")
| stats count by user, action, object_type, object_name
| sort -count
| head 100
description: RHV audits capture who changed clusters, storage, and VM definitions. Scheduled reporting on high-risk verbs supports SOX/ISO access reviews and speeds insider-threat investigations when VMs move unexpectedly.
value: Produces defensible evidence of administrative changes without relying solely on the Engine UI history pane.
implementation: Ingest `audit.log` with a LINE_BREAKER suited to Java logging. Extract `user` and action tokens. Feed summaries to a summary index for 400-day retention if required by policy. Alert on after-hours `LOGIN` from non-jump-host IPs.
visualization: Table (top actions), Timeline (admin events), Pie chart (action categories).
